title: Irish Beef Stew
description: A hearty and comforting stew made with tender beef and creamy sauce, inspired by traditional Irish cuisine.
instructions: 1. Dust beef cubes with flour, shaking off excess.
2. In a large Dutch oven or pot, heat 2 tablespoons of oil over medium-high heat.
3. Brown beef cubes in batches until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes. Remove browned beef from pot.
4. Add chopped onion to pot and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
5. Add chopped carrots and potatoes to pot, cooking for an additional 5 minutes.
6. Add browned beef back to pot, along with beef broth, thyme, salt, and pepper.
7. Stir in creamy sauce, making sure it's well combined.
8. Bring stew to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 2-3 hours or until beef is tender.
9. Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
